//_comment: This is the 'master' DocType that Maintenance Request.assigned_technician links to. In ERPNext terms, this is like a simplified Employee/Supplier master — a small reference table other documents point to via Link fields.
name: Asset Technician
//_autoname_field: Uses the technician_name field value itself as the primary key (name), instead of a generated ID. Fine for small reference tables with unique human-readable names.
